# Phase-11 — AI Platform Engineering & MLOps

> Industrialize machine learning with feature stores, MLOps, and serving.
>
> Suggested timeline: **Weeks 41-44**

Each prompt below instructs GitHub Copilot to generate exactly one standalone Markdown
chapter with all 50 mandatory sections (Azure-primary, ~60/30/10 Azure/OSS/AWS+GCP).

| # | Prompt | Generates | Study time |
|---|--------|-----------|------------|
| 01 | [Machine Learning Foundations](01_Machine_Learning_Foundations.prompt.md) | `Machine_Learning_Foundations.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 02 | [Feature Stores with Feast](02_Feature_Stores_with_Feast.prompt.md) | `Feature_Stores.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 03 | [MLOps and MLflow](03_MLOps_and_MLflow.prompt.md) | `MLOps_and_MLflow.md` | 75 min + 5h |
| 04 | [Model Serving and Ray](04_Model_Serving_and_Ray.prompt.md) | `Model_Serving_and_Ray.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 05 | [Azure Machine Learning](05_Azure_Machine_Learning.prompt.md) | `Azure_Machine_Learning.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 06 | [ML Pipeline Architecture](06_ML_Pipeline_Architecture.prompt.md) | `ML_Pipeline_Architecture.md` | 60 min + 4h |
| 07 | [Responsible AI](07_Responsible_AI.prompt.md) | `Responsible_AI.md` | 45 min + 2h |

## How to run
Open a prompt file in VS Code and run it with GitHub Copilot (agent mode), or reference it
from Copilot Chat. It will produce the corresponding `.md` chapter listed above.
